changes.value:
## What

Register `"attachment"` and `"attachment-list"` display components in the field display registry. These render enriched attachment metadata objects returned by the entity layer.

### Data shape (from entity layer read)
Each attachment in the array is:
```json
{ "id": "01abc", "name": "screenshot.png", "size": 12345, "mime_type": "image/png", "path": "/absolute/path/to/.kanban/tasks/.attachments/01abc-screenshot.png" }
```

### Display behavior
- **`attachment-list`** (multiple): renders a list of attachment items
- **`attachment`** (single): renders one attachment item
- Each item shows: filename, human-readable file size (e.g., "12.1 KB"), MIME type icon (paperclip fallback)
- Image MIME types (`image/*`): show inline thumbnail via Tauri `convertFileSrc()` asset protocol
- Click on filename: open the file with the OS default app via Tauri `invoke("plugin:shell|open", { path })`
- Empty state: subtle "No attachments" text

### Registration
Follow the existing pattern in `kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/registrations/`:
- Create `registrations/attachment.tsx` with adapter components
- Register via `registerDisplay("attachment", ...)` and `registerDisplay("attachment-list", ...)`
- Import in `registrations/index.ts`

### Files to create
- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/displays/attachment-display.tsx` — display components
- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/displays/attachment-display.test.tsx` — vitest tests
- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/registrations/attachment.tsx` — registry adapters

### Files to modify
- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/registrations/index.ts` — import attachment registration

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `"attachment-list"` display registered and renders array of attachment metadata
- [ ] `"attachment"` display registered and renders single attachment metadata
- [ ] Filenames displayed and human-readable file sizes shown
- [ ] Image attachments show inline thumbnails
- [ ] Empty state handled gracefully

## Tests (vitest + React Testing Library)
- [ ] Test: renders attachment list with multiple items — filenames and sizes in DOM
- [ ] Test: renders single attachment
- [ ] Test: empty array renders empty state
- [ ] Test: image MIME type gets thumbnail treatment
- [ ] Test: non-image MIME type gets icon treatment
- [ ] Run: `pnpm test` in `kanban-app/ui/` — all pass

changes.forward_patch: --- original +++ modified @@ -11,11 +11,30 @@ ### Display behavior - **`attachment-list`** (multiple): renders a list of attachment items - **`attachment`** (single): renders one attachment item -- Each item shows: filename, human-readable file size (e.g., "12.1 KB"), MIME type icon (paperclip fallback) -- Image MIME types (`image/*`): show inline thumbnail via Tauri `convertFileSrc()` asset protocol -- Click on filename: open the file with the OS default app via Tauri `invoke("plugin:shell|open", { path })` +- Each item shows: filename, human-readable file size (e.g., "12.1 KB"), file type icon - Empty state: subtle "No attachments" text +### File type icons (lucide-react, already installed) +Map MIME type / extension to lucide icon names — no new dependencies: +- `image/*` → `FileImage` +- `video/*` → `FileVideo` +- `audio/*` → `FileAudio` +- `text/*`, `.md`, `.txt` → `FileText` +- `.js`, `.ts`, `.py`, `.rs`, `.go`, etc. → `FileCode` +- `.pdf` → `FileText` +- `.csv`, `.xls`, `.xlsx` → `FileSpreadsheet` +- `.zip`, `.tar`, `.gz`, `.7z` → `FileArchive` +- fallback → `File` + +Use the existing `icons[kebabToPascal(name)]` dynamic lookup pattern already used in `entity-icon.tsx`, `entity-inspector.tsx`, and `entity-card.tsx`. + +### Image thumbnails (convertFileSrc, already installed) +For `image/*` MIME types, show an inline thumbnail instead of just the icon: +- Use `convertFileSrc()` from `@tauri-apps/api` (already a dependency) to turn the absolute `path` into an `asset://localhost/` URL +- Render as `` with constrained dimensions +- Requires enabling asset protocol scope in `tauri.conf.json` +- Fallback to `FileImage` icon if the image fails to load + ### Registration Follow the existing pattern in `kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/registrations/`: - Create `registrations/attachment.tsx` with adapter components @@ -29,12 +48,15 @@ ### Files to modify - `kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/registrations/index.ts` — import attachment registration +- `kanban-app/tauri.conf.json` — enable asset protocol scope for local file thumbnails ## Acceptance Criteria - [ ] `"attachment-list"` display registered and renders array of attachment metadata - [ ] `"attachment"` display registered and renders single attachment metadata -- [ ] Filenames displayed and human-readable file sizes shown -- [ ] Image attachments show inline thumbnails +- [ ] Filenames displayed with human-readable file sizes +- [ ] File type icons from lucide based on MIME type / extension +- [ ] Image attachments show inline thumbnail via `convertFileSrc()` +- [ ] Thumbnail falls back to `FileImage` icon on load error - [ ] Empty state handled gracefully ## Tests (vitest + React Testing Library) @@ -41,6 +63,7 @@ - [ ] Test: renders attachment list with multiple items — filenames and sizes in DOM - [ ] Test: renders single attachment - [ ] Test: empty array renders empty state -- [ ] Test: image MIME type gets thumbnail treatment -- [ ] Test: non-image MIME type gets icon treatment +- [ ] Test: image MIME type renders img element (mock convertFileSrc) +- [ ] Test: non-image MIME type renders lucide icon, no img element +- [ ] Test: correct icon for code files, spreadsheets, archives, etc. - [ ] Run: `pnpm test` in `kanban-app/ui/` — all pass \ No newline at end of file
changes.reverse_patch: --- original +++ modified @@ -11,30 +11,11 @@ ### Display behavior - **`attachment-list`** (multiple): renders a list of attachment items - **`attachment`** (single): renders one attachment item -- Each item shows: filename, human-readable file size (e.g., "12.1 KB"), file type icon +- Each item shows: filename, human-readable file size (e.g., "12.1 KB"), MIME type icon (paperclip fallback) +- Image MIME types (`image/*`): show inline thumbnail via Tauri `convertFileSrc()` asset protocol +- Click on filename: open the file with the OS default app via Tauri `invoke("plugin:shell|open", { path })` - Empty state: subtle "No attachments" text -### File type icons (lucide-react, already installed) -Map MIME type / extension to lucide icon names — no new dependencies: -- `image/*` → `FileImage` -- `video/*` → `FileVideo` -- `audio/*` → `FileAudio` -- `text/*`, `.md`, `.txt` → `FileText` -- `.js`, `.ts`, `.py`, `.rs`, `.go`, etc. → `FileCode` -- `.pdf` → `FileText` -- `.csv`, `.xls`, `.xlsx` → `FileSpreadsheet` -- `.zip`, `.tar`, `.gz`, `.7z` → `FileArchive` -- fallback → `File` - -Use the existing `icons[kebabToPascal(name)]` dynamic lookup pattern already used in `entity-icon.tsx`, `entity-inspector.tsx`, and `entity-card.tsx`. - -### Image thumbnails (convertFileSrc, already installed) -For `image/*` MIME types, show an inline thumbnail instead of just the icon: -- Use `convertFileSrc()` from `@tauri-apps/api` (already a dependency) to turn the absolute `path` into an `asset://localhost/` URL -- Render as `` with constrained dimensions -- Requires enabling asset protocol scope in `tauri.conf.json` -- Fallback to `FileImage` icon if the image fails to load - ### Registration Follow the existing pattern in `kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/registrations/`: - Create `registrations/attachment.tsx` with adapter components @@ -48,15 +29,12 @@ ### Files to modify - `kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/registrations/index.ts` — import attachment registration -- `kanban-app/tauri.conf.json` — enable asset protocol scope for local file thumbnails ## Acceptance Criteria - [ ] `"attachment-list"` display registered and renders array of attachment metadata - [ ] `"attachment"` display registered and renders single attachment metadata -- [ ] Filenames displayed with human-readable file sizes -- [ ] File type icons from lucide based on MIME type / extension -- [ ] Image attachments show inline thumbnail via `convertFileSrc()` -- [ ] Thumbnail falls back to `FileImage` icon on load error +- [ ] Filenames displayed and human-readable file sizes shown +- [ ] Image attachments show inline thumbnails - [ ] Empty state handled gracefully ## Tests (vitest + React Testing Library) @@ -63,7 +41,6 @@ - [ ] Test: renders attachment list with multiple items — filenames and sizes in DOM - [ ] Test: renders single attachment - [ ] Test: empty array renders empty state -- [ ] Test: image MIME type renders img element (mock convertFileSrc) -- [ ] Test: non-image MIME type renders lucide icon, no img element -- [ ] Test: correct icon for code files, spreadsheets, archives, etc. +- [ ] Test: image MIME type gets thumbnail treatment +- [ ] Test: non-image MIME type gets icon treatment - [ ] Run: `pnpm test` in `kanban-app/ui/` — all pass \ No newline at end of file

changes.forward_patch: --- original +++ modified @@ -15,13 +15,13 @@ - Empty state: subtle "No attachments" text ### File type icons (lucide-react, already installed) -Map MIME type / extension to lucide icon names — no new dependencies: +Generate the appropriate lucide icon based on MIME type — no file content loaded, no asset protocol needed: - `image/*` → `FileImage` - `video/*` → `FileVideo` - `audio/*` → `FileAudio` - `text/*`, `.md`, `.txt` → `FileText` -- `.js`, `.ts`, `.py`, `.rs`, `.go`, etc. → `FileCode` -- `.pdf` → `FileText` +- `application/javascript`, `application/typescript`, `.js`, `.ts`, `.py`, `.rs`, `.go`, etc. → `FileCode` +- `application/pdf` → `FileText` - `.csv`, `.xls`, `.xlsx` → `FileSpreadsheet` - `.zip`, `.tar`, `.gz`, `.7z` → `FileArchive` - fallback → `File` @@ -28,13 +28,6 @@ Use the existing `icons[kebabToPascal(name)]` dynamic lookup pattern already used in `entity-icon.tsx`, `entity-inspector.tsx`, and `entity-card.tsx`. -### Image thumbnails (convertFileSrc, already installed) -For `image/*` MIME types, show an inline thumbnail instead of just the icon: -- Use `convertFileSrc()` from `@tauri-apps/api` (already a dependency) to turn the absolute `path` into an `asset://localhost/` URL -- Render as `` with constrained dimensions -- Requires enabling asset protocol scope in `tauri.conf.json` -- Fallback to `FileImage` icon if the image fails to load - ### Registration Follow the existing pattern in `kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/registrations/`: - Create `registrations/attachment.tsx` with adapter components @@ -48,15 +41,12 @@ ### Files to modify - `kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/registrations/index.ts` — import attachment registration -- `kanban-app/tauri.conf.json` — enable asset protocol scope for local file thumbnails ## Acceptance Criteria - [ ] `"attachment-list"` display registered and renders array of attachment metadata - [ ] `"attachment"` display registered and renders single attachment metadata - [ ] Filenames displayed with human-readable file sizes -- [ ] File type icons from lucide based on MIME type / extension -- [ ] Image attachments show inline thumbnail via `convertFileSrc()` -- [ ] Thumbnail falls back to `FileImage` icon on load error +- [ ] Correct lucide icon generated per MIME type / extension - [ ] Empty state handled gracefully ## Tests (vitest + React Testing Library) @@ -63,7 +53,7 @@ - [ ] Test: renders attachment list with multiple items — filenames and sizes in DOM - [ ] Test: renders single attachment - [ ] Test: empty array renders empty state -- [ ] Test: image MIME type renders img element (mock convertFileSrc) -- [ ] Test: non-image MIME type renders lucide icon, no img element -- [ ] Test: correct icon for code files, spreadsheets, archives, etc. +- [ ] Test: image MIME type gets FileImage icon +- [ ] Test: code file gets FileCode icon +- [ ] Test: unknown type gets fallback File icon -
